2022-23 Dayton Flyers Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season Next Season

Record: 22-12 (12-6, 2nd in A-10 MBB)

Coach: Anthony Grant

PS/G: 68.6 (259th of 363)

PA/G: 61.0 (10th of 363)

SRS: 8.71 (73rd of 363)

SOS: 1.09 (127th of 363)

ORtg: 107.2 (106th of 363)

DRtg: 95.3 (33rd of 363)

Preseason Odds: Championship +8000
